rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex clauses only from requirement intent and visible symbols, avoiding inferred or implicit constraints.
Place assumptions in component type annexes unless implementation-level bindings are explicitly required.
generic_rules: Use only explicitly available variables in AGREE expressions; do not assume AADL properties are visible as identifiers.
Ensure expression types match: comparisons must involve compatible numeric or boolean domains.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Boolean expressions must derive from ports or constants declared as bool; numeric comparisons require scalar numeric types.
anti_patterns: Do not convert AADL property names (e.g., Period, Deadline) into AGREE variables without explicit typed exposure.
Do not invent bounds (e.g., x >= 0) not stated in the requirement.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
